pkgmetadata.longdescription: Library, to enable 3D game development for Haskell, based on bindings to 3D Graphics, Audio and GUI libraries. This is the SFML Bindings module, which provides Audio and Input System (Joystick, Mouse, Keyboard) functionality. Platform: Windows only License: Apache License, Version 2.0 Install: see http://www.althainz.de/HGamer3D/Download-and-Installation.html
